mapper.sql: select d.detail_id, d.user_id, u.nickname, u.phone, d.change_type, d.source_type, d.source_id, d.change_points, d.balance, d.description, d.create_by, d.create_time from t_points_detail d left join t_user u on u.user_id = d.user_id
mapper.select: where d.user_id=#{userId} order by d.detail_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_points_detail(user_id, change_type, source_type, source_id, change_points, balance, description, create_by, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{changeType}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{changePoints}, #{balance}, #{description}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(change_points),0) from t_points_detail where change_type=#{changeType}
